Library.XMLDescription: Funkce: Vrací výpočty SLA pro daný záznam
Library.Command:
SET ANSI_NULLS ON GO SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON GO
-- ============================================= -- Author: Daniel Šašek -- Create date: 2024-11-01 -- Description: -- ============================================= #MODIFIER# FUNCTION #NAME# ( @Ident nvarchar(100) ) RETURNS @RetVal TABLE ( [Value] int ,[Title] nvarchar(100) ,[TitleResourceKey] nvarchar(100) ,[SimpleModeTitleResourceKey] nvarchar(100) ,[ColorCssClass] varchar(100) ,[SimpleModeColorCssClass] varchar(100) ,[IsOutOfSLA] varchar(10) ) AS BEGIN DECLARE @XML xml
SELECT TOP 1 @XML = CAST(REPLACE([XML], '<?' + 'xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>', '') as xml) FROM dbo.XMLDefinition WHERE Ident = @Ident AND [Type] = 'WorkFlow' ORDER BY ID DESC
INSERT INTO @RetVal([Value], [Title], [TitleResourceKey], [SimpleModeTitleResourceKey], [ColorCssClass], [SimpleModeColorCssClass], [IsOutOfSLA]) SELECT T.N.value('@Value', 'int') as [Value] ,T.N.value('@Title', 'nvarchar(100)') as [Title] ,T.N.value('@TitleResourceKey', 'nvarchar(100)') as [TitleResourceKey] ,ISNULL(T.N.value('@SimpleModeTitleResourceKey', 'nvarchar(100)'), T.N.value('@TitleResourceKey', 'nvarchar(100)')) as [SimpleModeTitleResourceKey] ,T.N.value('@ColorCssClass', 'varchar(100)') as [ColorCssClass] ,ISNULL(T.N.value('@SimpleModeColorCssClass', 'varchar(100)'), T.N.value('@ColorCssClass', 'varchar(100)')) as [SimpleModeColorCssClass] ,T.N.value('@IsOutOfSLA', 'varchar(10)') as [IsOutOfSLA] FROM @XML.nodes('WorkFlow/Definition/States/State') as T(N)
RETURN END
